name: chisel
description: Design system studio for frontend interfaces. Cut the design, trace it onto pages, trim the edges, check the work.

commands.name: cut
commands.description: Cut the design — direction, tokens, component showcase
commands.argument_hint: Optional: what you're building (e.g. "admin dashboard", "analytics app")

commands.name: trace
commands.description: Trace the design — build frontend pages using the design system
commands.argument_hint: What to build (e.g. "dashboard with sidebar", "settings page", "login form")

commands.name: lay
commands.description: Lay out the design — regenerate component showcase

commands.name: trim
commands.description: Trim the edges — tweak tokens, preview, propagate
commands.argument_hint: What to change (e.g. "warmer palette", "rounder buttons", "smaller text")

commands.name: check
commands.description: Check the work — audit code against the design system
